notes: Zapier polls MongoDB. In OpenFn, the cron pattern uses a since-cursor (ObjectId of last seen _id, or a timestamp field). MongoDB Change Streams could power a webhook-style trigger but Zapier does not use them.

triggers.name: New Collection
triggers.description: Fires when a new collection is created.

triggers.name: New Database
triggers.description: Fires when a new database is created.

triggers.name: New Document
triggers.description: Fires when a new document is added to a collection.

triggers.name: New Field
triggers.description: Fires when a new field appears in a document.
